title: Hangup
description: Enable the built-in hangup tool for conversational verbs (agent and s2s). When present, the runtime injects a 'hangup' tool; when the model calls it, the call is ended with a reason placed in an X-Reason SIP header. The LLM-supplied reason wins, falling back to the app-supplied default below.

reason.description: Default reason placed in the X-Reason SIP header when the call is hung up. Used as a fallback when the LLM does not supply its own reason.
